name: Ferplast Dual Collar Orange CF25/53
shortDescription: The Ferplast Dual CF Nylon Dog Collar is a durable, stylish, and practical choice for everyday walks. Crafted from tough nylon and finished with a refined metal buckle, it combines long-lasting strength with a touch of elegance. Available in multiple sizes, including the CF25/53, it caters to a wide variety of breeds.
description: The Ferplast Dual CF Collar is perfect for dog owners who value strength, comfort, and understated elegance. Whether you opt for the vibrant orange for visibility or a more classic shade, this collar will keep your dog safe, stylish, and comfortable. Why Choose the Dual CF Collar? • Secure fit thanks to its sturdy buckle and adjustable holes. • High visibility in the orange version – great for outdoor adventures. • Stylish versatility – works for casual walks or as part of a coordinated look with matching accessories. • Durable build designed to last through active daily use.
